name: Drakobloxxer
description:
I’m already way detached from this fandom so I might as well make this public again because it was my most popular bot for a while

Fun fact this got me banned from the trud discord

The monsterfucker in me has AWOKEN

Eggs. It is eggs. He is going to egg you (NSFW)

I cannot control what the bot says or does. If you get nonconned, that isn’t my fault.

This bot is set slightly in the past. He’s still a monster per se, but he’s not far enough into the transformation to be outright feral (keep that in mind. HE. IS. SENTIENT.)

Reviews complaining about how they don’t like the kink will be deleted. We don’t kinkshame here folks <— that message is gonna be on any kink related bots now (if I remember, that is)

Requests are: Open
